basic_details.job_title: WII Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Institute of India (WII) has released the official Office Assistant Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026 at Wildlife Institute of India. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the WII Office Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with Graduation qualification and working knowledge of MS Office/Tally Software, aged up to 55 years, can apply offline on or before 25 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years as on 25-06-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Graduation from any recognized Board/Institution. Working Knowledge of MS Office/Tally Software.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WII Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.wii.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WII Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the WII Office Assistant post is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation degree from a recognized Board/Institution and possess a working knowledge of MS Office/Tally Software.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Office Assistant position at the Wildlife Institute of India.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Office Assistant post is 55 years as of 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the WII Office Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the WII Office Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Skill Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Wildlife Institute of India, www.wii.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Office Assistant position is on a contract basis.
